suitable_for_zh: 准备搬迁、扩充或翻新的办公室团队
需要优化前台、会议室、工位和收纳的中小企业
希望在开工前先确认动线、机电点位和材料方向的业主
需要配合管理处要求、施工时段和交付节点的商业空间
suitable_for_en: Office teams planning relocation, expansion, or renovation
SMEs that need reception, meeting room, workstation, and storage improvements
Owners who want layout, M&E points, and material direction clarified before work starts
Commercial spaces that need to coordinate management rules, work hours, and handover timing
common_projects_zh: 办公室前台与等候区规划
会议室、经理房和开放工位布局
隔间、玻璃、门、天花和地面更新
照明、插座、网络点位和基础机电协调
茶水间、储物柜、文件柜和品牌墙方向
common_projects_en: Meeting room, manager room, and open workstation layout
Partitions, glass, doors, ceiling, and flooring updates
Lighting, power points, network points, and basic M&E coordination
Pantry, storage cabinet, filing cabinet, and brand-wall direction

process_steps_zh.title: 需求整理
process_steps_zh.desc: 确认办公室人数、部门关系、会议需求、储物需求、预算因素和目标搬入时间。

process_steps_zh.title: 现场检查
process_steps_zh.desc: 核对面积、原有隔间、天花、地面、插座、网络点位、空调和管理处限制。

process_steps_zh.title: 布局规划
process_steps_zh.desc: 整理前台、会议室、工位、储物、茶水间和通行动线，形成可报价范围。

process_steps_zh.title: 材料与机电协调
process_steps_zh.desc: 确认地板、墙面、灯光、玻璃、柜体、插座和弱电等需要配合的项目。

process_steps_zh.title: 报价与执行安排
process_steps_zh.desc: 根据确认范围、现场条件和审批要求安排报价沟通与施工协调。

process_steps_en.title: Requirement Review
process_steps_en.desc: Confirm team size, department relationship, meeting needs, storage needs, budget factors, and target move-in timing.

process_steps_en.title: Site Check
process_steps_en.desc: Review floor area, existing partitions, ceiling, flooring, power points, network points, air-conditioning, and management restrictions.

process_steps_en.title: Layout Planning
process_steps_en.desc: Plan reception, meeting rooms, workstations, storage, pantry, and circulation so the quotation scope is clear.

process_steps_en.title: Material & M&E Coordination
process_steps_en.desc: Coordinate flooring, wall finishes, lighting, glass, cabinets, power points, and data points where required.

process_steps_en.title: Quotation & Execution Planning
process_steps_en.desc: Arrange quotation discussion and work coordination based on confirmed scope, site conditions, and approval requirements.

scope_items_zh: 插座、网络点位和基础机电协调
施工时段与管理处要求协调
scope_items_en: Flooring, wall finishes, ceiling, and lighting
Power points, network points, and basic M&E coordination

faqs_zh.q: 办公室装修前需要准备什么资料？
faqs_zh.a: 建议准备平面图或现场照片、面积、人数、部门需求、会议室数量、预计搬入时间、管理处要求和现有机电情况。

faqs_zh.q: 可以配合管理处或业主方施工要求吗？
faqs_zh.a: 可以按已确认规则协调施工时段、出入安排、保护要求和交付节点。具体要求需要以管理处或业主方文件为准。

faqs_zh.q: 报价会受哪些因素影响？
faqs_zh.a: 面积、隔间数量、玻璃和木作、地面天花、灯光、电源网络点位、空调和施工时段都会影响范围与报价。

faqs_zh.q: 可以先做 layout 或效果图方向吗？
faqs_zh.a: 可以作为规划参考，但必须清楚标注为设计方案或效果图方向，不能写成真实完工案例或客户证明。

faqs_en.q: What should we prepare before an office renovation quote?
faqs_en.a: Prepare a floor plan or site photos, floor area, staff count, department needs, meeting-room requirements, target move-in date, management rules, and existing M&E condition.

faqs_en.q: Can the work follow building management or landlord requirements?
faqs_en.a: Yes. Work hours, access, protection requirements, and handover timing can be coordinated based on confirmed building or landlord rules.
Floor area, partitions, glass works, carpentry, flooring, ceiling, lighting, power and network points, air-conditioning, and work-hour restrictions all affect scope and quotation.

faqs_en.q: Can layout ideas or rendering concepts be prepared first?
faqs_en.a: Yes, as planning references. They must be clearly labeled as design or rendering concepts and not presented as completed project proof or customer evidence.

suitable_for_zh: 准备装修 shoplot、零售门店或展示空间的业主
美容、诊所、showroom、小型餐饮或服务型门店前场规划
需要规划顾客动线、展示区、柜台和后场收纳的商家
希望在开业前确认材料方向、照明、机电和施工范围的租户
suitable_for_en: Owners planning a shoplot, retail store, or showroom fit-out
Beauty, clinic, showroom, small F&B, or service-front retail spaces
Businesses that need customer flow, display area, counter, and back-of-house storage planning
Tenants who want material direction, lighting, M&E, and work scope clarified before opening
common_projects_zh: 门面入口与招牌方向规划
展示区、动线和顾客停留区整理
收银柜台、服务柜台和储物柜规划
灯光、插座、网络点位和基础机电协调
墙面、地面、天花、材料饰面和品牌色方向
开业前施工范围和交付准备
common_projects_en: Frontage, entrance, and signboard direction planning
Display zones, customer flow, and waiting-area organization
Cashier counter, service counter, and storage cabinet planning
Lighting, power points, network points, and basic M&E coordination
Wall, floor, ceiling, material finish, and brand-colour direction
Pre-opening fit-out scope and handover preparation

process_steps_zh.title: 开店资料整理
process_steps_zh.desc: 确认店面照片、面积、营业类型、租约交付状态、管理方要求和预计开业时间。

process_steps_zh.title: 动线与分区规划
process_steps_zh.desc: 整理入口、展示区、柜台、后场、储物、员工操作区和顾客停留区。

process_steps_zh.title: 材料与视觉方向
process_steps_zh.desc: 确认墙面、地面、天花、灯光、柜体、品牌色和效果图方案边界。

process_steps_zh.title: 报价范围确认
process_steps_zh.desc: 把柜台木作、机电、照明、饰面、门面和收尾项目整理成可报价范围。

process_steps_zh.title: 执行与交付协调
process_steps_zh.desc: 根据已确认的现场条件、管理要求和目标开业时间安排施工协调。

process_steps_en.title: Pre-Opening Intake
process_steps_en.desc: Confirm shop photos, floor area, business type, tenancy handover status, management requirements, and target opening date.

process_steps_en.title: Flow & Zone Planning
process_steps_en.desc: Plan entrance, display zones, counter, back-of-house, storage, staff workflow, and customer waiting areas.

process_steps_en.title: Material & Visual Direction
process_steps_en.desc: Confirm wall, floor, ceiling, lighting, cabinet, brand-colour, and rendering concept boundaries.

process_steps_en.title: Quotation Scope
process_steps_en.desc: Translate counter carpentry, M&E, lighting, finishes, frontage, and finishing works into a quotable scope.

process_steps_en.title: Execution & Handover Coordination
process_steps_en.desc: Coordinate works based on confirmed site conditions, management requirements, and target opening timing.

scope_items_zh: 店铺 layout 与顾客动线
门面入口和品牌形象方向
灯光、插座、网络点位和基础机电协调
墙面、地面、天花和材料饰面
效果图方案或规划示例标注
scope_items_en: Lighting, power points, network points, and basic M&E coordination
Wall, floor, ceiling, and material finishes
Rendering concepts or planning examples with clear labeling

faqs_zh.q: 店铺装修前需要准备什么资料？
faqs_zh.a: 建议准备店面照片、面积、营业类型、租约交付状态、管理方要求、品牌方向和预计开业时间。

faqs_zh.q: 你们可以规划柜台和展示区吗？
faqs_zh.a: 可以按已确认范围规划收银柜台、服务柜台、展示区、储物区和顾客动线，最终以现场测量和报价为准。

faqs_zh.q: 报价和工期可以固定写在页面吗？
faqs_zh.a: 不建议。面积、拆改、机电、柜体、门面、材料、施工时段和审批要求都会影响报价与安排。

faqs_zh.q: 效果图或示例图可以用于页面吗？
faqs_zh.a: 可以，但必须清楚标注为概念设计、效果图方案或规划示例，不能写成真实完工案例或客户照片。

faqs_en.q: What should I prepare before planning a shop renovation?
faqs_en.a: Prepare shop photos, floor area, business type, tenancy handover status, management requirements, brand direction, and target opening date.

faqs_en.q: Can you plan counters and display areas?
faqs_en.a: Yes. Cashier counters, service counters, display zones, storage, and customer flow can be planned based on confirmed scope, site measurement, and quotation.

faqs_en.q: Can fixed pricing or fixed timelines be stated on the page?
faqs_en.a: No. Floor area, demolition, M&E, carpentry, frontage, materials, work-hour limits, and approval requirements all affect scope and scheduling.

faqs_en.q: Can rendering or example images be used?
faqs_en.a: Yes, but they must be clearly labeled as design concepts, rendering concepts, or planning examples, not completed project proof or real customer photos.
